text:
Market today: Mixed macro backdrop. Oil spiking on Iran/Hormuz news adds inflation pressure, which keeps rate-cut hopes muted — that's a headwind for high-multiple tech and chip names like yours. Nothing in today's headlines is a direct catalyst for your book, but the macro drag is real.

Your holdings: Three need attention. PLTR is down 17% and flagged SELL — on margin, that hole gets deeper fast; your stop is $85, know your exit. AVGO is your largest position, down 13% and flagged TRIM — size is the risk here, margin amplifies every tick lower. SPCX is a brand-new, very volatile IPO with almost no trading history — it's already -0.5% with a tight $150 stop; one bad session could slice through it. Margin amplifies all of these.

Watch: 1) Oil prices — sustained spike feeds inflation fears, pressures tech multiples hard. 2) AVGO price action — as your biggest position, a break toward $336 stop forces a decision fast.

Bottom line: Your two biggest risks are AVGO's size and PLTR's loss — on margin, both need a concrete action plan today, not tomorrow.
